meta.degree_en: MSc Artificial Intelligence Applications and Innovation
meta.bio_en: Currently pursuing an MSc in Artificial Intelligence Applications and Innovation at Imperial College London (I-X Lab). Specializing in computer vision, multimodal perception and autonomous robotics, with end-to-end experience from algorithm R&D to production deployment. Proficient in ROS, PyTorch and edge inference, with real-world projects spanning UAV inspection, intelligent forklifts and IoT health monitoring. Passionate about embodied AI and cross-domain transfer — turning multimodal perception into systems that change the physical world.
meta.bio_zh: 目前就读于帝国理工学院 I-X Lab，攻读人工智能应用与创新硕士学位。专注于计算机视觉、多模态感知与自主机器人系统，具备从算法研发到生产部署的完整工程能力。熟练运用 ROS、PyTorch 及边缘推理技术栈，在无人机巡检、智能叉车与 IoT 健康监测项目中均有实际落地经验。热衷于具身智能与跨场景迁移研究，致力于将多模态感知转化为改变物理世界的智能系统。

projects.title_zh: 小鼠基因组 VNTR 变异检测
projects.desc_en: A computer vision solution for high-throughput genomics data, designed for precise detection of Variable Number Tandem Repeat (VNTR) variations in mouse reference genomes. Addressing the low recognition rate of traditional bioinformatics methods in complex repetitive regions, I built a complete visual detection pipeline: from manual annotation of VNTR blocks to deep learning model training and deployment. Core contributions included designing block annotation protocols, constructing a training set of 262 samples, and training a YOLOv10 object detection model to screen high-confidence candidate regions. This methodological contribution was directly applied to a publication in Cell Genomics, providing critical technical support for resolving the structural complexity of high-quality mouse reference genomes.
projects.desc_zh: 面向高通量基因组学数据的计算机视觉解决方案，用于精准检测小鼠参考基因组中的可变数目串联重复序列（VNTR）变异。针对传统生物信息学方法在复杂重复区域识别率低的问题，构建了一套完整的视觉检测流程：从VNTR区块的人工标注到深度学习模型的训练部署。核心工作包括设计区块标注规范、构建262个样本的训练集，并基于YOLOv10训练目标检测模型筛选高置信度候选区域。该方法学贡献直接应用于Cell Genomics期刊论文的发表，为高质量小鼠参考基因组的结构复杂性解析提供了关键技术支持。

projects.title_zh: 高速公路智能无人机巡检
projects.desc_en: An end-to-end AI system deployment project for infrastructure inspection, building a full-stack hardware-platform-network architecture from scratch. Addressing pain points in traditional highway manual inspection — low efficiency, high risk, and high miss rates — I completed customer requirements research, system architecture design, and production deployment within one month, enabling automated UAV cruising and intelligent defect detection. Core contributions included constructing an anomaly mining pipeline based on ~3,000 flight logs, identifying 7 recurring failure patterns through data-driven methods; simultaneously optimizing YOLO detection model accuracy for highway scenarios, improving defect detection accuracy by 9%.
projects.desc_zh: 面向基础设施巡检场景的端到端AI系统落地项目，从零到一构建「硬件-平台-网络」全栈架构。针对高速公路传统人工巡检效率低、危险性高、漏检率高的痛点，一个月内完成客户需求调研、系统架构设计与部署上线，实现无人机自动化巡航与智能缺陷检测。核心贡献在于构建基于约3000条飞行日志的异常挖掘流水线，通过数据驱动方法识别出7类重复出现的故障模式；同时优化YOLO检测模型在高速公路场景下的精度，将缺陷检测准确率提升9%。

projects.title_zh: 微机器人姿态与深度估计系统
projects.desc_en: A visual perception system for microrobotics, implementing end-to-end prediction from monocular images to 6-DoF pose and depth based on the OTMR (Optical Tweezers Microrobot) dataset. Addressing challenges in micromanipulation scenes — including micron-scale robot size, complex lighting conditions, and high background noise — I designed a multi-task learning framework that simultaneously regresses position coordinates (x,y,z) and rotation quaternions. Comparative analysis of baseline CNN, ResNet-18, and ResNet-50 backbones, achieving less than 5% depth estimation error under limited training data through grid search optimization of batch size and weight decay.
projects.desc_zh: 一个面向微尺度机器人的视觉感知系统，基于OTMR（Optical Tweezers Microrobot）数据集实现单目图像到6自由度位姿与深度的端到端预测。针对显微操作场景下微机器人尺寸微小、光照条件复杂、背景噪声高的挑战，设计多任务学习框架同时回归位置坐标(x,y,z)与旋转姿态四元数。对比分析基础CNN、ResNet-18与ResNet-50三种骨干网络，通过网格搜索优化超参数，在有限训练数据下实现深度估计误差小于5%的精度。

projects.title_zh: 睡眠噪声监测与睡眠质量分析系统
projects.desc_en: An end-to-end IoT health monitoring system that reveals hidden correlations between environmental noise and sleep quality through multi-source sensor fusion. The system employs an ESP32-S3 microcontroller paired with an INMP441 MEMS microphone, capturing continuous nighttime audio at 16kHz via I2S digital interface; simultaneously integrating Apple Watch sleep stage data to build a cross-device temporal alignment and correlation analysis framework. A lightweight Flask backend receives real-time HTTP data streams, while the frontend dashboard provides noise-sleep correlation analysis, anomaly event detection (3-sigma rule), K-Means state clustering, and cross-night trend comparison.
projects.desc_zh: 一个端到端的物联网健康监测系统，通过多源传感器融合揭示环境噪声与睡眠质量的隐性关联。系统采用ESP32-S3微控制器搭配INMP441 MEMS麦克风，以16kHz采样率进行连续夜间噪声采集；同时整合Apple Watch睡眠阶段数据，构建跨设备的时间对齐与关联分析框架。系统部署轻量级Flask后端接收实时HTTP数据流，前端可视化面板提供噪声-睡眠相关性分析、异常事件检测（3σ准则）、K-Means状态聚类及跨夜间趋势对比。

projects.title_zh: 多模态感知自主导航机器人系统
projects.desc_en: Imperial College London ELEC70120 culminating project, building a complete indoor autonomous driving robot system integrating 2D vision, depth estimation, path planning and imitation learning on the JetAcker platform (Jetson Nano + A1 LiDAR + Orbbec AstraProPlus) under ROS Melodic. Core subsystems include: waypoint navigation with AMCL localization and TEB local planner achieving zero-collision trajectory tracking; dual YOLO detector architecture for traffic signs and lights with bounding-box-area distance proxy; and Learning from Demonstration parking using 5 human demonstrations with nearest-neighbor replay to handle narrow scenarios where traditional planners fail.
projects.desc_zh: 帝国理工学院ELEC70120课程culminating project，基于JetAcker机器人平台（Jetson Nano + A1 LiDAR + Orbbec AstraProPlus）在ROS Melodic框架下构建完整室内自主驾驶系统。核心子系统包括：基于AMCL定位与TEB规划器实现零碰撞轨迹跟踪的航点导航；部署双检测器架构（交通标志+信号灯），基于边界框面积设计距离代理机制；以及通过5次人工示教采集轨迹、最近邻策略回放完成狭窄车位自主泊车的LfD模仿学习模块。
